tasks.label: 1. 编译 iOS 应用 (Simulator)
tasks.command: xcodebuild -project mobile_gateway_ios/SmartGlassGateway.xcodeproj -scheme SmartGlassGateway -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath mobile_gateway_ios/build -configuration Debug build

tasks.label: 2. 启动 iOS 模拟器
tasks.command: open -a Simulator && xcrun simctl boot 'iPhone 16' || true

tasks.label: 3. 部署并运行 iOS 应用到模拟器
tasks.command: xcrun simctl install booted mobile_gateway_ios/build/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/SmartGlassGateway.app && xcrun simctl launch booted edu.ncu.smartglass.SmartGlassGateway
